case_title: CHIEF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT VS. NOVIS CORPORATION A NEVADA CORPORATION DBA ROUND

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIEF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT NOVIS CORPORATION A NEVADA CORPORATION DBA ROUND MEDICAL SUPPLY AND UNIFORMS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIEF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NOVIS CORPORATION A NEVADA CORPORATION DBA ROUND MEDICAL SUPPLY AND UNIFORMS $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

documents.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIEF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NOVIS CORPORATION A NEVADA CORPORATION DBA ROUND MEDICAL SUPPLY AND UNIFORMS $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
